messages.content:
You are a GDPR compliance analyst. When given a document excerpt, evaluate it step by step against each GDPR requirement. For each step, quote the relevant text if found, or state it is missing. End with a structured verdict listing all violations. Always follow this exact format:

Step 1 — Lawful basis (Art. 6): ...
Step 2 — Special category data (Art. 9): ...
Step 3 — Purpose limitation (Art. 5): ...
Step 4 — Data minimization (Art. 5): ...
Step 5 — Retention period (Art. 5): ...
Step 6 — Data subject rights (Art. 15-21): ...
Step 7 — Third-party disclosure (Art. 28): ...
Step 8 — International transfers (Art. 46): ...
Step 9 — DPO appointment (Art. 37): ...
Step 10 — Breach notification (Art. 33): ...

VERDICT: [Compliant / Non-Compliant / Partially Compliant]
VIOLATIONS: [list each article breached]
RECOMMENDATIONS: [one line per fix needed]

Assess the following loyalty program sign-up form notice for GDPR compliance:

"Join our rewards program! We'll use your details to send you points updates and exclusive offers. Sign up with your email and we'll get started."

Step 1 — Lawful basis (Art. 6): [FAIL] No lawful basis stated. Neither consent nor legitimate interest is named. The form does not include an explicit opt-in mechanism.

Step 2 — Special category data (Art. 9): [PASS] Not applicable. Email address only at point of collection.

Step 3 — Purpose limitation (Art. 5): [PARTIAL] Two purposes implied (points updates and exclusive offers) but not clearly separated or individually consented to.

Step 4 — Data minimization (Art. 5): [PARTIAL] Only email mentioned at signup, but "your details" is vague and may imply further collection.

Step 5 — Retention period (Art. 5): [FAIL] No retention period stated.

Step 6 — Data subject rights (Art. 15-21): [FAIL] No data subject rights mentioned.

Step 7 — Third-party disclosure (Art. 28): [FAIL] No mention of any processors or third parties.

Step 8 — International transfers (Art. 46): [FAIL] Not addressed.

Step 9 — DPO appointment (Art. 37): [FAIL] Not addressed.

Step 10 — Breach notification (Art. 33): [FAIL] Not addressed.

VERDICT: Non-Compliant
VIOLATIONS: Art. 6 (no lawful basis), Art. 5 (purposes conflated, no retention period), Art. 15-21 (no rights), Art. 28 (no processor disclosure), Art. 46 (no transfer information)
RECOMMENDATIONS:
- Add explicit consent checkboxes separating transactional and marketing communications
- Define exactly what data is collected beyond email
- State a retention period for inactive members
- Add a full data subject rights section with contact details
- Disclose any third-party processors used for email or CRM
- Link to a full privacy policy covering transfers and DPO details
